---
title: "Projects"
listing:
  contents: 
    - "**/index.qmd"     # Folder containing project `.qmd` files
  sort: "title"
  type: grid
#  image-height: 260px
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
engine: knitr
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: full
#  fields: [title, description, categories]
---


```{css, echo = FALSE}
#title-block-header .description {
    display: none;
}
```

These projects include software I have developed, workshop materials I have presented, and assessment systems I have contributed to.
<br>

---

<br>
